INTERNAL COMPLIANCE MEMORANDUM — Eucalyptus Forge Limited (Australia) — 31 May 2026
To: Board Risk Committee; From: Ms. Rowan Keating, General Counsel (rowan.keating@eucalyptusforge.com.au; +61 7 3550 8123).
Subject: MNPI status, disclosure timing (ASX LR 3.1 / s674), blackout observance, and PII handling.
Draft term sheet dated 30 May with Harbour & Flint Capital Pty Ltd for a $40m unsecured revolving facility at BBSY+325 bps is confidential; if executed it cures current liquidity risk and is likely price-sensitive—MNPI until ASX announcement or cleansing.
Board papers include an incomplete proposal for a $25m institutional placement at a 12% discount; LR 3.1A applies while confidentiality and incompleteness persist; we will request a pre-open trading halt tomorrow if proceeds become certain.
Unaudited May quarter cashflow (Appendix 4C draft) shows cash runway < 9 months due to delayed Murroon project receipts; not generally available and likely material—MNPI; no staff trading until release.
Our Securities Dealing Policy blackout runs from 1 July until FY results (Appendix 4E/Annual Report) are lodged; in addition, an ad hoc blackout applies now for all Designated Persons; insider trading risk under s1043A applies and any director dealing requires Appendix 3Y.
Note that the ASX announcement lodged on 18 April 2026 re: completion of the Bracken Ridge pilot, and the investor presentation released the same day, are already public and do not constitute MNPI.
Selective disclosure risk: pre-sounding calls with two funds (Wattle Path Superannuation Fund and Osprey Peak Capital) must be conducted under wall-crossing protocols; do not disclose non-public financials without confirming confidentiality.
Supplier contingency: internal email from Operations notes Karloo Alloys Pty Ltd will miss June shipments; while not yet priced into markets, this could reduce Q1 FY27 revenue by ~8%; monitor for probability/quantum threshold per GN8.
Employment/PII: Mr. Hayden Zhou (CFO) and Dr. Lila Serrano (Clinical Lead) are privy to the above; Ms. Serrano’s approved medical leave dates (5–16 June) are sensitive health information under the Privacy Act and must be restricted.
Credit/PII: Pre-employment background check results for Ms. Priya Menon (Finance Analyst candidate) include a benign default listed in 2018; retain only for hiring assessment and delete within 90 days per APP 11.
Public-domain references such as the 12 May trade press article quoting our April ASX release, and a competitor update issued by Coralbyte Engineering Ltd on 20 May, are not MNPI and should not constrain trading beyond policy.
If the facility or placement terms crystallise, prepare draft LR 3.1 release and consider a trading halt to manage an orderly market; if using s708A, prepare a cleansing notice; if confidentiality breaks, immediate disclosure is required notwithstanding incompleteness.
Confirm that any investor education deck excludes internal forecasts and draft cashflow; issuer-relative materiality should be assessed iteratively with the Chair.
Any staff seeking to trade must obtain written clearance; no dealing by Designated Persons until the Appendix 4C is released and the ad hoc blackout is lifted; breaches may require voluntary notification to ASIC.
Queries: contact Legal & Compliance via legal@eucalyptusforge.com.au or Ms. Keating directly.
